family_summary: This overwrite stops using annual administrative windows as if they were episodes. Instead it keeps one broad pre-Oslo occupied-territories aggregate anchor from B'Tselem and one clearly bounded massacre-like subepisode at Jerusalem's Temple Mount. The bundle is still partial, but the episode logic is stronger.
notes: Separate from the Second Intifada. Direct violent deaths only; broader repression and detention harms are not converted into mortality estimates unless explicitly counted as deaths.
